message:
fix(fcp-core): rebuild SignatureSet node_ids cache on deserialization

The SignatureSet struct has a node_ids cache for O(1) duplicate detection.
Previously, this cache was marked with #[serde(skip)] and not rebuilt after
deserialization, causing duplicate detection in add() to fail silently.

This fix implements custom Deserialize that rebuilds the node_ids cache from
the deserialized signatures, ensuring duplicate detection works correctly
after roundtrip serialization.

Also adds regression test: test_signature_set_duplicate_detection_after_deserialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
